description: Top-tier venue database for paper quality filtering. tier1 = CCF-A / CORE A* / 頂會, tier2 = CCF-B / CORE A. q1_journals = JCR Q1 or equivalent prestige.

q1: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering
IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security
IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering

NeurIPS: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems

ICCV: IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision

EMNLP: Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing
NAACL: North American Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics

CCS: ACM Conference on Computer and Communications Security
NDSS: Network and Distributed System Security Symposium

IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
